title: Create a Service Account
description: HR needs a read-only service account on this server. SSH in from the lab workstation and create user apprentice with a home directory.

workstation.reason: SSH from a terminal or Ubuntu Desktop workstation to the training server.

tasks: Create user apprentice with home directory
Set a login shell of /bin/bash for apprentice

objectivesPublic.label: SSH into the lab
objectivesPublic.text: Connect from the Lab Terminal using session credentials.
objectivesPublic.hint: Copy username and password from the lab session panel into your SSH command.

objectivesPublic.label: Create apprentice account
objectivesPublic.text: Add UNIX user apprentice with a home directory and a normal login shell.
objectivesPublic.hint: useradd flags control home directory and shell — verify the account with id when done.
